creator: chris@cretaforce.gr
text:
After upgrade to pcre-8.34 there is an issue with Vbulletin that described here:

http://www.vbulletin.com/forum/forum/vbulletin-4/vbulletin-4-questions-problems-and-troubleshooting/4021226-inline-images-showed-only-as-full

Fix: 

This patch will fix the issue:

http://bugs.exim.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1423
